title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Akshaya Private Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Akshaya Private Limited. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Sales Manager to strengthen our Nashik-based team.

About Akshaya Private Limited:
Akshaya Private Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Akshaya Private Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
